stages.concept:
# Unit 069: 목적격 보어로 쓰이는 to부정사 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **목적격 보어로 쓰이는 to부정사**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I want **you to come** to my party.
> 나는 네가 내 파티에 오기를 원한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 일부 동사는 **목적어 + to부정사** 형태를 취해요. 이때 to부정사는 **목적격 보어** 역할을 해요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **want + 목적어 + to부정사** — ~가 …하기를 원하다

> She wants **me to help** her.
> 그녀는 내가 도와주기를 원한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **ask + 목적어 + to부정사** — ~에게 …하도록 요청하다

> He asked **me to open** the window.
> 그는 나에게 창문을 열어달라고 요청했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **tell + 목적어 + to부정사** — ~에게 …하라고 말하다

> My mom told **me to clean** my room.
> 엄마는 나에게 방을 청소하라고 말했다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"My mom told me (       ) my room."
1. clean
2. cleaning
3. to clean ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: **allow + 목적어 + to부정사** — ~가 …하도록 허락하다

> The teacher allowed **us to leave** early.
> 선생님은 우리가 일찍 떠나도록 허락했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **advise + 목적어 + to부정사** — ~에게 …하도록 충고하다

> The doctor advised **him to rest**.
> 의사는 그에게 쉬라고 충고했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **expect + 목적어 + to부정사** — ~가 …하기를 기대하다

> I expect **them to win** the game.
> 나는 그들이 경기에서 이기기를 기대한다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: want, ask, tell, allow, advise, expect 등 뒤에 목적어 + to부정사가 오는 거군요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 069: 목적격 보어로 쓰이는 to부정사 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분이 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
It is scary to walk alone at night.
> **정답** 진주어

---

**02.** My mom told me to clean my room.
> **정답** 목적격 보어

---

**03.** She wants me to come early.
> **정답** 목적격 보어

---

**04.** It is not easy to forgive someone.
> **정답** 진주어

---

**05.** The teacher asked us to be quiet.
> **정답** 목적격 보어

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She told me cleaning my desk.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** cleaning → to clean

---

**07.** He asked her coming early.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** coming → to come

---

**08.** My mom wants me studying hard.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** studying → to study

---

**09.** The teacher told us not talking in class.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** talking → to talk

---

**10.** She asked him helping her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** helping → to help

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
엄마가 나에게 방을 청소하라고 했다.
My mom told me my room.
> **정답** to clean

---

**12.** 선생님이 우리에게 조용히 하라고 하셨다.
The teacher asked us quiet.
> **정답** to be

---

**13.** 그녀는 나에게 일찍 오라고 했다.
She wanted me early.
> **정답** to come

---

**14.** 아빠가 나에게 늦지 말라고 하셨다.
My dad told me late.
> **정답** not to be

---

**15.** 그는 나에게 도와달라고 부탁했다.
He asked me him.
> **정답** to help

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
엄마가 나에게 숙제를 하라고 말씀하셨다.
told My mom me to do my homework
> **정답** My / mom / told / me / to / do / my / homework

---

**17.** 선생님이 우리에게 책을 읽으라고 하셨다.
asked The teacher us to read the book
> **정답** The / teacher / asked / us / to / read / the / book

---

**18.** 그녀는 그에게 전화하지 말라고 했다.
She him to told not call her
> **정답** She / told / him / not / to / call / her

---

**19.** 아빠가 나에게 일찍 자라고 하셨다.
My dad me wanted to go to bed early
> **정답** My / dad / wanted / me / to / go / to / bed / early

---

**20.** 그는 나에게 기다리라고 부탁했다.
asked He me to wait
> **정답** He / asked / me / to / wait
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 069: 목적격 보어로 쓰이는 to부정사 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Amy asked me ________________ her after dinner.
But, I wanted her __________________ me first
because I don't have her number.
call
to call
calling
to calling
> **정답** to call

---

**02.** 다음 문장에서 동사와 목적격 보어를 찾으시오.
I promised my teacher not to
be late.
> **정답** promised , not to be late.

---

**03.** 다음 문장에서 동사와 목적격 보어를 찾으시오.
The player expected another
player to catch the ball.
> **정답** expected , to catch the ball.

---

**04.** 다음 문장에서 동사와 목적격 보어를 찾으시오.
The doctor allowed the patient
to leave the hospital.
> **정답** allowed , to leave the hospital.

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 to부정사가 목적격 보어 역할을 하는 것을
모두 고르시오. [2개]
I don't want him to copy my homework.
Amy's wish is to study abroad when she
becomes 20.
Her mother loves to talk endlessly with her.
Tom told me to write letters to him.
> **정답** I don't want him to copy my homework., Tom told me to write letters to him.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 to부정사가 목적격 보어 역할을 하는 것을
모두 고르시오. [2개]
Their hobby is to take pictures during
weekends.
My parents expected me to win the first place
in the race.
Amy asked them to go and buy some salt and
some flour.
Tom likes to dance when he listens to music.
> **정답** Amy asked them to go and buy some salt and some flour., My parents expected me to win the first place in the race.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The boy wanted me to help him with his
homework.
He order me to finish the project.
Tom told me answering the ringing phone.
Amy asked her mother to walk the dog.
> **정답** Tom told me answering the ringing phone.

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She allowed her son riding a motocycle only
once a week.
A doctor advised me to sleep for more than 8
hours a day.
Their parents want them to follow the house
rules.
The guard warned the kids to stay away from
the dangerous places.
> **정답** She allowed her son riding a motocycle only once a week.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
강아지들은 자신이 짖으면 주인이 자신에게 올 것을 기대한다.
Dogs expect their owners coming to them
when they bark.
Dogs expect for their owners to come to them
when they bark.
Dogs expect their owners to come to them
when they bark.
Dogs expect their owners come to them when
they bark.
> **정답** Dogs expect their owners to come to them when they bark.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
선생님은 학생들에게 수업에서 핸드폰을 사용하지 말라고
지시했다.
The teacher ordered students not using cell
phones during class time.
The teacher ordered to students not to use
cell phones during class time.
The teacher ordered students to not use cell
phones during class time.
The teacher ordered students not to use cell
phones during class time.
> **정답** The teacher ordered students not to use cell phones during class time.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
부모들은 자녀들에게 시간을 낭비하지 말라고 충고한다.
Parents advise their children not to waste
time.
Parents advise children to not waste time.
Parents advise children not to wastig time.
Parents advise children not waste time.
> **정답** Parents advise their children not to waste time.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I want my friends come over to my house
during the weekend.
My mom allows me to watch TV show when
she is not home.
The man asked a young man at a cafe to put
some cream into his coffee.
The teacher told the students to open the
textbook.
> **정답** I want my friends come over to my house during the weekend.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The soccer coach asked Tom joining the
soccer team.
My friends told me not to talk to her when she
studies.
The boss ordered the workers to work late for
months.
The audience expected the star to be the best
on the stage.
> **정답** The soccer coach asked Tom joining the soccer team.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Mom doesn't tell me study until late.
The stranger asked me to tell him how to get
to the station.
He advised her to not eat too much junk food.
The English teacher warned the students not
speaking Korean.
• warn 경고하다
> **정답** The stranger asked me to tell him how to get to the station.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
He asked them be quiet.
We will tell he not to attend the class.
I would like you to be there for me at the
party.
Her writing skill enables she to be a writing
teacher.
> **정답** I would like you to be there for me at the party.

---

**16.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
The police warned the driver
to slowing down.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** slowing → slow

---

**17.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
The accident caused the company
was shut down.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** was → to be

---

**18.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
They advised she not to give
up.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** she → her

---

**19.** 다음 중 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐쓰시오. (2개)
The owner of the shopping mall is thinking a lot
about her company. She wants many customers
coming to her mall. And, she wants
to make much money. But, only a few
people come to the mall. It's hard for her
to keep running the mall. She will begin
think about closing the mall.
> **정답** to come, to make, to keep, to think

---

**20.** 다음 중 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐쓰시오. (2개)
My older sister asked me cleaning her
room. I didn't want to do it for her.
The next day, I needed borrow her
computer. She let me use it. It was very kind
of her to use her computer.
> **정답** to clean, to do, to borrow, use
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 069 목적격 보어로 쓰이는 to부정사중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
손님은 판매원에게 할인을 해달라고 요청했다. [ask, give]
The customer  (     )  the salesperson  (     )  
a discount.
정답 asked, to, give

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
선생님은 학생들에게 사전을 이용하도록 허락해 주셨다.
[allow, use]
The teacher  (     )  the students  (     )   (     )  a
dictionary.
정답 allowed, to, use

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
Amy는 그녀의 부모님이 자전거를 사 줄 거라고 기대하
고 있다. [expect, buy]
Amy is  (     )  her parents  (     )   (     )  her a
bike.
정답 expecting, to, buy

---

**04.** 다음 글을 읽고 틀린 부분을 모두 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오. (2개)
It is Amy's birthday this Sunday. She asked her
friends [come] (     )  to her birthday party.
The friends all want [to come] (     )  to the
party. Amy's mother advised Amy]
[wear] (     )  a long birthday dress. But,
[to wear] (     )  a dress is uncomfortable. So,
her plan is to put o]n a shirt and jeans.
정답 to come, to come, to wear, to wear

---

**05.** 다음 글을 읽고 틀린 부분을 모두 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오. (2개)
He is very strict. He orders us [be]
quiet in public. He also tells us [to behave]
well in front of others. But, he is not always like]
that. He sometimes likes to tell us jokes. He is
funny, too. His dream was [to become] (     )  a
comedian a long time ago. We like]
[spend] (     )  time with him.
• strict 엄격한
정답 to be, to behave, to become, to spend (spending)

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
advise, memorize, English words
A: What did your teacher advise you to do (     )
B: She  (     )  me  (     )   (     )   (     )  
every day.
정답 advised, to, memorize, English, words

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
want, walk, the dog
A: What do you want me to do after school?
B: I  (     )  you  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 want, to, walk, the, dog

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
ask, make, a special guest
A: What did you ask the cook to do?
B: I  (     )  the cook  (     )   (     )  dishes for 
  (     ) .
정답 asked, to, make, a, special, guest

---

**09.** 글을 읽고 네모 안에 주어진 동사의 알맞은 형태를
이용하여 글을 완성하시오.
I wanted [talk] (     )  to my teacher about my
future. I asked her if I could ]talk to her after class. She
told me [come] (     )  to her office at 4 p.m. I
told my teacher about my i]nterests. I told her that one
of my interests is [draw] (     )  pictures and I
wanted to be an artist. She said to me, "
[be] (     )  an artist may be difficult, but you
can do it."]
정답 to talk, to come, to draw (drawing), To be (Being)

---

**10.** 글을 읽고 네모 안에 주어진 동사의 알맞은 형태를
이용하여 글을 완성하시오.
Lewis's plan was [invite] (     )  her friends over
to her house and to play. She wante]d
[watch] (     )  a movie with them. But, her
brother asked her [cancel] (     )  her plan. He
said he had an exam and wanted [study]
for it quietly.
정답 to invite, to watch, to cancel, to study

---

**11.** 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
A  [mother]  [ordered]  [her]  [son]
[taking]  a  [shower]  [after]  [dinner.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 taking → to take

---

**12.** 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
[The]  [teacher]  [asked]  [me]  [of]  [come]
[to]  [his]  [office]  [now.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 of → to

---

**13.** 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
I  [expect]  [them]  [showed]  [up]  [in]
[10]  [minutes.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
• show up 나타나다
정답 showed → to show

---

**14.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
Jeff는 그녀에게 올해 그와 결혼하자고 말했다. [marry,
him, told, to, her]
Jeff  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  this year.
정답 told, her, to, marry, him

---

**15.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
Amy는 주말동안 그들이 그녀의 노트북을 사용하도록 허
락했다. [use, them, allowed, to, her]
Amy  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  laptop
during weekends.
정답 allowed, them, to, use, her

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
부모님은 내가 많은 책을 읽기 원하신다. [read, want,
many, to, me]
My parents  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
books.
정답 want, me, to, read, many

---

**17.** 다음 글을 읽고 틀린 부분을 모두 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오. (2개)
We like our teacher. She allows us
[to have] (     )  some fun when we study. She
also tells us [take] (     )  a break when we
want. She never forces us [to doing]
much homework. I want her [to be]
my teacher again next year. My friends also exp]ect
her [to be] (     )  their homeroom teacher
again next year.]
정답 to have, to take, to do, to be, to be

---

**18.** 글을 읽고 주어진 동사의 알맞은 형태를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
John wanted Brian [help] (     )  him with his
math homework. So he asked Brian]
[come] (     )  to his house. But, Brian had no
time [teach] (     )  math to John. Instead, Brian
allowed John [borrow] (     )  his homework note.
정답 to help, to come, to teach, to borrow

---

**19.** 다음 문장을 영작하시오.
그는 그의 엄마가 주무실 거라고 예상했다. [expect, his
mom, sleep]
He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 expected, his, mom, to, sleep

---

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
Vivian은 내가 그녀에게 전화하기 원했다. [want, call]
Vivian  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  her.
정답 wanted, me, to, call

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 069: 목적격 보어로 쓰이는 to부정사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Tom asked me ________________ him after school.
But, I wanted him __________________ me first because I don't have his number.
call to call calling to calling
> 정답: to call
